parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Prepare Result Files').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  success: true,
  action: 'agent1_prd_generate',
  message: 'PRD 생성 및 Git Repository 저장이 완료되었습니다.',
  requestId: input.requestId,
  requirementSetId: input.requirementSetId,
  requirementFilePaths: input.requirementFilePaths,
  promptFilePath: input.promptFilePath,
  prdFilePath: input.prdFilePath,
  mapFilePath: input.mapFilePath,
  logFilePath: input.logFilePath,
  githubOwner: input.githubOwner,
  githubRepo: input.githubRepo,
  githubBranch: input.githubBranch,
  completedAt: new Date().toISOString()
}}];
